Stephen stood half head shorter than me, but he radiat- ed  military competence in the same way that fine Avanti sedan exudes Juxury: His dark prown eyes bored into mine; noticed hint of Asian folds at the corners watched his face as the preference for relying on his Uwm skill fought with the common sense of using the team's specialist: Reluctantly he nodded and stepped away: Jaime was at the panel once her Slender fingers picking through the color-coded wiring faster and with greater confidence than Stephen had.
